description: The Luppino crime family is an 'Ndrangheta organized crime family based in Hamilton, Ontario, Canada, founded in the 1950s by Giacomo Luppino. It is one of three centralized Mafia organizations in Hamilton, alongside the Musitano and Papalia families. The family has strong connections with the Buffalo crime family and has been involved in racketeering, drug trafficking, and other criminal activities. By 2018, the Violi family had increased its role, but both Violi brothers were imprisoned for drug offenses. The family is now believed to be the Buffalo family's Canadian crew.

country_links.evidence_quote: Giacomo Luppino was born in 1900 in the village of Oppido Mamertina , Calabria, Italy. Already involved in organized crime in Calabria
country_links.context: Giacomo Luppino was born in Italy and was involved in organized crime there before immigrating to Canada.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Luppinos have had strong connections with the Buffalo crime family of Buffalo, New York .
country_links.context: The Luppino crime family has strong connections with the Buffalo crime family based in Buffalo, New York, and has fallen under its control, acting as its Canadian crew.
